en: OF DAVID.To you, O LORD, I lift up my soul.
zh: 耶和華啊！我的心仰望你。

en: O my God, in you I trust; let me not be put to shame; let not my enemies exult over me.
zh: 我的 神啊！我倚靠你，求你不要使我羞愧， 也不要使我的仇敵勝過我。

en: Indeed, none who wait for you shall be put to shame; they shall be ashamed who are wantonly treacherous.
zh: 等候你的必不羞愧， 但那些無故以詭詐待人的必要羞愧。

en: Make me to know your ways, O LORD; teach me your paths.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你把你的道路指示我， 求你把你的路徑教導我，

en: Lead me in your truth and teach me, for you are the God of my salvation; for you I wait all the day long.
zh: 求你以你的真理引導我，教訓我， 因為你是拯救我的 神； 我整天等候的就是你。

en: Remember your mercy, O LORD, and your steadfast love, for they have been from of old.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你記念你的憐憫和慈愛， 因為它們自古以來就存在。

en: Remember not the sins of my youth or my transgressions; according to your steadfast love remember me, for the sake of your goodness, O LORD!
zh: 求你不要記念我幼年的罪惡和我的過犯； 耶和華啊！求你因你的恩惠， 按著你的慈愛記念我。

en: Good and upright is the LORD; therefore he instructs sinners in the way.
zh: 耶和華是良善和正直的， 因此他必指示罪人走正路。

en: He leads the humble in what is right, and teaches the humble his way.
zh: 他必引導謙卑的人行正義， 把他的道路教導謙卑的人。

en: All the paths of the LORD are steadfast love and faithfulness, for those who keep his covenant and his testimonies.
zh: 遵守耶和華的約和法度的人， 耶和華都以慈愛和信實待他們。

en: For your name's sake, O LORD, pardon my guilt, for it is great.
zh: 耶和華啊！因你名的緣故， 求你赦免我的罪孽，因為我的罪孽重大。

en: Who is the man who fears the LORD? Him will he instruct in the way that he should choose.
zh: 誰是那敬畏耶和華的人？ 耶和華必指示他應選擇的道路。

en: His soul shall abide in well-being, and his offspring shall inherit the land.
zh: 他必安享福樂， 他的後裔要承受地土。

en: The friendship of the LORD is for those who fear him, and he makes known to them his covenant.
zh: 耶和華把心意向敬畏他的人顯示， 又使他們認識他的約。

en: My eyes are ever toward the LORD, for he will pluck my feet out of the net.
zh: 我的眼睛時常仰望耶和華， 因為他必使我的腳脫離網羅。

en: Turn to me and be gracious to me, for I am lonely and afflicted.
zh: 求你轉向我，恩待我， 因為我孤獨困苦。

en: The troubles of my heart are enlarged; bring me out of my distresses.
zh: 我心中的愁苦增多， 求你使我從痛苦中得釋放。

en: Consider my affliction and my trouble, and forgive all my sins.
zh: 求你看看我的困苦和艱難， 赦免我的一切罪惡。

en: Consider how many are my foes, and with what violent hatred they hate me.
zh: 求你看看我的仇敵，因為他們人數眾多， 他們深深痛恨我。

en: Oh, guard my soul, and deliver me! Let me not be put to shame, for I take refuge in you.
zh: 求你護衛我的性命，搭救我； 不要叫我羞愧，因為我投靠你。

en: May integrity and uprightness preserve me, for I wait for you.
zh: 願純全和正直保護我， 因為我等候你。

en: Redeem Israel, O God, out of all his troubles.
zh: 神啊！求你救贖以色列， 救他脫離一切困苦。
